# Seasoning

> A simple, friendly recipe book. Save anything you cook, adjust it to suit you, and discover what's in season.

Seasoning helps people organise their cooking. It is a personal recipe book that accepts recipes from plain text, photos of a cookbook or handwritten card, or a URL from any recipe website. Once saved, each recipe can be adjusted: scaled to more or fewer portions, swapped to a vegetarian version, or reworked to use cheaper ingredients. Seasoning also surfaces seasonal ingredient suggestions and lets friends share recipe books.

## What Seasoning is for

- Keeping every recipe you cook in one place, no matter where it came from.
- Resizing portions cleanly so nothing is wasted.
- Making the same recipe cheaper, vegetarian, or quicker without rewriting it.
- Cooking with ingredients that are actually in season.
- Sharing recipes with friends and seeing what they cook.

## What Seasoning is not

- Not a meal-kit service. It does not ship ingredients.
- Not a social network. Sharing is only between accepted friends.
- Not a professional cooking tool. It is built for home cooks.

## How it works

1. Create a free account with an email and password.
2. Add a recipe by pasting text, uploading a photo, or dropping in a URL. Seasoning parses it into a clean ingredients list and method.
3. Adjust the recipe: change servings, swap to vegetarian, make it cheaper, or convert units between metric and imperial.
4. Cook. Tick off ingredients into a shopping basket if you want to shop first.
5. Add friends to share recipes both ways.

## Key pages

- /              Landing page with overview, features, and FAQ.
- /signup        Create a free account.
- /login         Sign in to an existing account.
- /dashboard     Personal recipe book (authenticated).
- /recipes/new   Add a new recipe from text, photo, or URL (authenticated).
- /larder        Ingredients you have at home (authenticated).
- /basket        Shopping basket built from saved recipes (authenticated).
- /friends       Friends and their shared recipes (authenticated).

## Brand

- Name: Seasoning
- Tagline: A pinch of you
- Tone: warm, simple, practical, a little playful, never corporate.

## Contact

- Website: https://seasoning.app
